zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Wingfield於1431年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可文費爾德時，她的父親Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington28歲，母親Elizabeth Goushill27歲。她於1452年與Thomas Daundy在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1470年在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Wingfield于1431年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可文費爾德时，她的父亲Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington28岁，母亲Elizabeth Goushill27岁。她于1452年与Thomas Daundy在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1470年在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Winfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Wingfield in Derbyshire, Bedfordshire, Suffolk, and Wiltshire. The Derbyshire placename probably derives from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + feld ‘open country’. The Bedfordshire placename may derive from Old English wince ‘nook, corner’ + feld. The Suffolk placename may derive from the Old English personal name Wiga + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) or Old English wīg ‘idol’ + feld. The Wiltshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English feld.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Wingfield was born in 1431, in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Goushill, was 27. She married Thomas Daundy in 1452, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1470, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Wingfield est née en 1431, à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Goushill, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Daundy en 1452, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1470, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Wingfield 1431 in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Goushill 27. Sie hat 1452 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Thomas Daundy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1470 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Wingfield è nata il nel 1431 nel Wingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Goushill, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Daundy nel 1452, nel Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1470, nel Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Wingfieldが1431年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィングフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Wingfield of Letheringtonは28歳，母Elizabeth Goushillは27歳であった。1452年にイギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチでThomas Daundyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1470年にイギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Wingfield(이)가 1431년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윙필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Goushill(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에서 Thomas Daundy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Wingfield nasceu em 1431, em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Goushill, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Daundy em 1452, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1470, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Wingfield родилась в 1431 г. в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Goushill, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Daundy в 1452 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1470 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Wingfield nació en 1431, en Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Goushill, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Thomas Daundy en 1452, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1470, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años.
